# Environment Runtime Adapters

PolyMoly intent is defined in `polymoly.yaml`.
## Files

- `system/adapters/env/examples/shared.env` = shared adapter defaults by domain blocks
- `system/adapters/env/examples/local.env` = local runtime environment adapter
- `system/adapters/env/examples/stage.env` = stage runtime environment adapter
- `system/adapters/env/examples/production.env` = production runtime environment adapter
- `system/adapters/env/examples/managed.env` = managed runtime environment adapter
